Player.title: Player
Player.description: Represents a football player within the SquadFlow application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Player entity (Firebase Auth UID).

name.description: The full name of the player.

nickname.description: A common or preferred nickname for the player.

number.description: The player's squad or jersey number.

preferredPositions.description: The player's preferred positions on the field.

team.description: The squad the player belongs to.

status.description: The current status of the player.

isAdmin.description: Whether the player has administrative privileges.

Game.title: Game
Game.description: Represents a scheduled football game or training session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Game entity.

date.description: The date when the game is scheduled to take place.

startTime.description: The start time of the event.

endTime.description: The end time of the event.

location.description: The physical location or address where the game will be played.

team.description: The team this fixture is for (Team A, Team B, or All).

opponent.description: The name of the opposing team (if applicable).

kitColors.description: The assigned kit for this game.

PlayerGameAttendance.title: PlayerGameAttendance
PlayerGameAttendance.description: Records a player's attendance status for a specific game.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PlayerGameAttendance entity (matches playerUid).

playerId.description: Reference to the Player attending the game.

gameId.description: Reference to the Game for which attendance is recorded.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp indicating when the status was last updated.

definition.description: Stores individual player profiles. playerUid is the Auth UID.
Records an individual player's attendance status for a specific game.
